headline: Medtronic plc (MDT) & Retia Expand Partnership to Target High-Risk Surgical and Critically ill Patients
summary: Medtronic plc (NYSE:MDT) is one of the best dividend aristocrat stocks to buy now. On June 5, Cardiovascular intelligence software company Retia Medical expanded its commercial relationship with Medtronic plc (NYSE:MDT) to include the distribution of Argos Cardiac Output Monitor. Medtronic is to help Retia expand into new markets and bring its hemodynamic monitoring technology […]
